calendar.matters:
Motion To Set Aside Judgment And Dismiss Action Without Prejudice
Off Calendar Apr-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Set Aside Judgment And Dismiss Action Without Prejudice.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to set aside judgment and dismiss action without prejudice" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
